content.en:
It didn't take long for the Alliance of Lords to prepare for a general assault on the Voidmon.

Although the Lord Alliance did not forcibly force other powerhouses to participate in the war this time, many Eight Extremes Realm were ready to participate in the war.

Ye Tian immediately invited other Eight Extremes Realms in the Eight Extremes Building, and soon many Eight Extremes Realms came to the Eight Extremes Building.

"Endless Ancestor, what did you invite us to do~?"

An Eight Extremes Realm asked.

Ye Tian said directly: "Join forces to kill the Void Beast!"

At this time, another Eight Extremes Realm said: "The Void Beast is very difficult to kill, and once we encounter a second-order Void Beast, we are afraid that our lives will be in danger, and the other Eight Extremes Realm are all taking refuge in a certain Immortal Realm Lord, following the Immortal Realm Lord to involve the Void Beast, and then the Immortal Realm Lord will take the initiative to kill the first-order Void Beast, and we, the Eight Extremes Realm, can't kill a Void Beast together!"

"I'm sure I'll kill the Void Beast!"

Ye Tian said confidently.

"You?"

Many of the Eight Extremes Realms present didn't believe it.

There was an Eight Extremes Realm and said: "Endless Ancestor, you haven't touched the second boundary barrier yet, you have only become an eight-pole realm for a short time, why do you make us believe that you have the strength to kill the Void Beast?"

"What if I had an eternal skill that could hurt the Void Beast in the Void State, and the damage it would do was not low. Moreover, I will dispatch three clones, and with your cooperation, if I find a lone Void Beast, I will be sure to kill the first-order Void Beast!"

Ye Tian said seriously.

"Really?"

Some of the Eight Extremes Realm were moved and asked urgently.

So, Ye Tian used his eternal technique, the Cave Void Secret Sword.

When the illusory little sword was unleashed, it pierced through the Void space-time territory and entered the Void Zone, and even pierced the Void Zone.

Although Ye Tian did not attack the Void Beast, he also had a lot of knowledge in the eighth-level realm present, and after a little deduction, he confirmed that such an attack was an eternal technique developed specifically against the Void Beast.

"Endless Ancestor, you were able to create such an eternal technique!"

The other Eight Extremes Realm and the Half-Step Eternal Realm were all shocked.

If they were allowed to create it, they would not be able to create it for countless eternity!

However, some of the Eight Extremes Realms do not have clones, so they are very sorry for their lives.

However, there were still many Eight Extremes Realm who were willing to follow Ye Tian to kill the Void Beast, and one of them was the Eight Extremes Realm who had touched the second boundary barrier, and it was Gu He Yuanzu.

Gu Heyuanzu was lucky, he didn't die in the Abyss Land before, but he was hit hard, so he has recovered from his recovery now.

Originally, he was going to try it by attacking the Eternal Realm, but this time he heard about the situation of the Void Beast.

The Void Beast can improve the will, and even help the will and body merge, although it is more helpful to the Immortal Realm and the Immortal Realm, but if the will is improved, the hope of breaking through is a little greater.

Therefore, he also wants to hunt the Void Beast. But he can't kill any Void Beast, so he can only rely on Ye Tian.

In the end, there were about five hundred Eight Extremes Realm who were willing to follow Ye Tian to hunt the Void Beast, and after everyone was ready, they came to the battlefield in the Void Region.

......

The battlefield in the Void Area is very large, Ye Tian and the others naturally will not go to the core battlefield, otherwise it will be troublesome to encounter a second-order Void Beast, and when they encounter a third- or fourth-order Void Beast, I am afraid that even escaping is a luxury.

So, just mix it up at the edges.

Ye Tian's three replica bodies were scattered, looking for traces of the Void Beast, and once they found it, they would notify the other Eight Extremes Realm.

Time passed slowly, and everyone was very careful.

Abrupt.

Ye Tian found the traces of a first-order void beast, and immediately notified the other eight-order realm half-step eternal realm powerhouses to come here, and he fought with these first-order void beasts to prevent the other party from escaping, so it would be troublesome to track down.

Therefore, it must be involved.

Ye Tian was only involved, and did not immediately cast the Eternal Technique Cave Void Secret Sword to prevent the other party from being afraid and escaping.

Soon, the other Eight Extremes Realm of the Eight Poles Tower arrived.

Bang!!!!!

One by one, the Eight Extremes Realm blocked this void, and the large arrays were arranged, just to trap this Void Beast in order to have any hope of killing it.

Sensing the crisis, this Void Beast instinctively released a signal for help, and once there were other Void Beasts nearby, it would instinctively come to help.

This is one of the reasons why Voidmon is so difficult to kill.

Wow!!!

The three Ye Tian appeared and began to use the Cave Void Secret Sword to attack this Void Beast.

At the same time, the other idle Eight Extremes Realm also shot with all their might, even if they could only do a little damage, it was a good damage to stack.

Puff puff!!!

The Three Cave Void Secret Sword stabbed at the Void Beast's body, causing it a certain amount of damage, causing the Void Beast to scream, and then the attacks of the other Eight Extremes Realm also fell on its body, but most of the damage was offset by the Void State.

But even so, the Void Beast's injuries were a little worse.

Knock knock knock!!

This Void Beast was constantly slapping at the formations and the imprisoned void, trying to get out of here.

However, it was impossible for the many Eight Extremes Realms to give it a chance to escape.

It didn't take long for the three Void Beasts to arrive.

"Three hundred Eight Extremes Realm to stop these Void Beasts!"

........ ，..

Ye Tian ordered.

Whoa!!!

Three hundred Eight Extremes Realm people went to stop it, and they definitely couldn't let these three Void Beasts support this Void Beast.

Soon, the three Void Beasts were also trapped, and there was no way to destroy Ye Tian's formation here and stop Ye Tian.

After another while, this Void Beast that was attacked by Ye Tian finally couldn't withstand the attacks of many Eight Extremes Realm again and again, and its vitality dissipated, and it was completely killed.

Immediately.

Ye Tian collected the corpse of this Void Beast and sent a message to the other Eight Extremes Realm to evacuate immediately, otherwise there would be a lot of Void Beasts here soon, and if a second-order Void Beast came, it would be a disaster.

Whoa!!!

Many of the Eight Extremes Realm quickly evacuated and soon disappeared.

Returning to an ownerless space-time territory, many of the Eight Extremes Realm began to renovate, and at the same time began to carve up the Void Beast.

Ye Tian contributed the most, so he naturally divided more Void Beast materials.

In a short time, the Void Beast was divided up.

"Guys, let's go hunt the Void Beast!"

Ye Tian said.

In the following days, under the leadership of Ye Tian, the Eight Extremes Realm of the Eight Extremes Building hunted one Void Beast after another, but there were also waves among them, encountering a second-order Void Beast and losing an Eight Extremes Realm, but this was nothing, and no one would quit.

this day.

The six leaders of the Lord Alliance trapped seven fifth-order void beasts and encircled and suppressed them to the most critical moment. _
